item.title: He REFUSED & Yet the CCTV Showed Every Step
item.description: He REFUSED & Yet the CCTV Showed Every Step

media:content.media:title: He REFUSED & Yet the CCTV Showed Every Step
media:content.media:description: He REFUSED & Yet the CCTV Showed Every Step

item.title: A.J. Freund case raised child welfare questions
item.description: Five-year-old A.J. Freund was reported missing from his Illinois home in April 2019, sparking a massive search that ended in tragedy when his body was found buried in a shallow grave. Investigators later revealed A.J. had suffered ongoing abuse and neglect before his death, despite multiple prior contacts with child welfare agencies. His parents were eventually convicted, while the case raised serious concerns about missed warning signs and failures within the system. Could A.J.’s death have been prevented if earlier warnings had been taken seriously?

media:content.media:title: A.J. Freund case raised child welfare questions
media:content.media:description: Five-year-old A.J. Freund was reported missing from his Illinois home in April 2019, sparking a massive search that ended in tragedy when his body was found buried in a shallow grave. Investigators later revealed A.J. had suffered ongoing abuse and neglect before his death, despite multiple prior contacts with child welfare agencies. His parents were eventually convicted, while the case raised serious concerns about missed warning signs and failures within the system. Could A.J.’s death have been prevented if earlier warnings had been taken seriously?

item.title: She Put Their Tiny Bodies in Cardboard Boxes - Megan Huntsman
item.description: Between 1996 and 2006, Utah mother Megan Huntsman secretly gave birth to six babies and killed them shortly after birth, hiding their bodies in cardboard boxes inside her garage. The horrifying discovery was made in 2014 when her estranged husband opened one of the boxes while cleaning the home. Huntsman later claimed she was addicted to meth and felt unable to care for the children. She pleaded guilty and received multiple life sentences. How could such a dark secret remain hidden for so many years?

media:content.media:title: She Put Their Tiny Bodies in Cardboard Boxes - Megan Huntsman
media:content.media:description: Between 1996 and 2006, Utah mother Megan Huntsman secretly gave birth to six babies and killed them shortly after birth, hiding their bodies in cardboard boxes inside her garage. The horrifying discovery was made in 2014 when her estranged husband opened one of the boxes while cleaning the home. Huntsman later claimed she was addicted to meth and felt unable to care for the children. She pleaded guilty and received multiple life sentences. How could such a dark secret remain hidden for so many years?
